task_completion.description: Checks if prp_conditions.csv was created with the required columns and at least 10 rows.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A spreadsheet or text editor showing a file named prp_conditions.csv with columns: tone_freq, letter, soa, corr_resp_tone, corr_resp_letter, and at least 10 rows of trial data containing mixed tones, letters, and SOAs.

task_completion.description: Checks if the PsychoPy experiment is saved to the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: PsychoPy Builder window open with the title bar or save dialog showing 'prp_task.psyexp' in the /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/ directory.

task_completion.description: Checks if the trial routine has fixation, auditory, and visual stimuli with correct timings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: PsychoPy Builder timeline or component properties showing a fixation component starting at 0.5s, an auditory/sound component starting at 0.5s, and a visual/text component starting at a variable time (e.g., $0.5 + soa or similar).

task_completion.description: Checks if keyboard responses are recorded for 3.0s without terminating the routine.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Keyboard component properties dialog showing the 'Force end of Routine' checkbox is UNCHECKED, and the duration/stop time is set to 3.0s.

task_completion.description: Checks if the trial routine is wrapped in a loop using the conditions file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: PsychoPy Builder Flow panel showing a loop around the trial routine, and the loop properties dialog showing the 'Conditions' field populated with 'prp_conditions.csv'.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent used the PsychoPy Builder GUI to create the experiment.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the PsychoPy Builder interface being actively used to add components and configure the experiment, rather than a text editor writing the .psyexp file directly.

integrity.description: Verifies the CSV was created by the agent.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent typing or generating the CSV content in a spreadsheet app, text editor, or terminal, rather than copying a pre-existing file.

integrity.description: Verifies the SOA is actually variable and not hardcoded to a single value in the visual component.
integrity.visual_evidence: The visual component's start time should reference a variable (like $soa) rather than a fixed number (like 0.6).

privileged_info_for_vlm: The conditions file must be saved at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/prp_conditions.csv and contain at least 10 rows. The experiment file must be saved at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/prp_task.psyexp. The conditions file must include columns for tone_freq, letter, soa, corr_resp_tone, and corr_resp_letter.
